{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Aetheric patterns
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Captain]] sews [[Aetheric patterns]] into mantles.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c26">''The Engineer'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
